themeWords.meaning: The covenant name of the God of Israel

sentenceTheme: God establishes David’s kingship, blesses his house in Jerusalem, and grants decisive victories over the Philistines with divine strategy.

verses.text: Now Hiram king of Tyre sent messengers to David, and timber of cedars, with masons and carpenters, to build him an house.

highlightedWords.meaning: Beloved; second king of Israel
Tyre; a prominent Phoenician coastal city

verses.text: And David perceived that the LORD had confirmed him king over Israel, for his kingdom was lifted up on high, because of his people Israel.

highlightedWords.meaning: The covenant name of the God of Israel
Israel; God strives; the nation descended from Jacob

verses.text: And David took more wives at Jerusalem: and David begat more sons and daughters.

highlightedWords.meaning: Beloved; second king of Israel
Jerusalem; the chief city of Israel

verses.text: Now these are the names of his children which he had in Jerusalem; Shammua, and Shobab, Nathan, and Solomon,

highlightedWords.meaning: Nathan; given; a son of David and a prophet’s name
Solomon; peaceful; son of David who became king

verses.text: And Ibhar, and Elishua, and Elpalet,

highlightedWords.meaning: Ibhar; he chooses; a son of David
Eliphelet/Elpalet; God is deliverance; a son of David

verses.text: And Nogah, and Nepheg, and Japhia,

highlightedWords.meaning: Nogah; brightness; a son of David
Japhia; shining; a son of David

verses.text: And Elishama, and Beeliada, and Eliphalet.

highlightedWords.meaning: Elishama; God has heard; a son of David
Eliphelet; God is deliverance; a son of David

verses.text: And when the Philistines heard that David was anointed king over all Israel, all the Philistines went up to seek David. And David heard of it, and went out against them.

highlightedWords.meaning: Philistines; inhabitants of Philistia
To anoint; to consecrate by applying oil

verses.text: And the Philistines came and spread themselves in the valley of Rephaim.

highlightedWords.meaning: Philistines; inhabitants of Philistia
Rephaim; a valley and ancient people associated with giants

verses.text: And David enquired of God, saying, Shall I go up against the Philistines? and wilt thou deliver them into mine hand? And the LORD said unto him, Go up; for I will deliver them into thine hand.

highlightedWords.meaning: God; mighty one
The covenant name of the God of Israel

verses.text: So they came up to Baal-perazim; and David smote them there. Then David said, God hath broken in upon mine enemies by mine hand like the breaking forth of waters: therefore they called the name of that place Baal-perazim.

highlightedWords.meaning: Lord of breakthroughs; name of the victory site
God; mighty one

verses.text: And when they had left their gods there, David gave a commandment, and they were burned with fire.

highlightedWords.meaning: gods; deities (false gods in this context)
Beloved; second king of Israel

verses.text: And the Philistines yet again spread themselves abroad in the valley.

highlightedWords.meaning: Philistines; inhabitants of Philistia
Valley; a low-lying ravine

verses.text: Therefore David enquired again of God; and God said unto him, Go not up after them; turn away from them, and come upon them over against the mulberry trees.

highlightedWords.meaning: Beloved; second king of Israel
God; mighty one

verses.text: And it shall be, when thou shalt hear a sound of going in the tops of the mulberry trees, that then thou shalt go out to battle: for God is gone forth before thee to smite the host of the Philistines.

highlightedWords.meaning: God; mighty one
Philistines; inhabitants of Philistia

verses.text: David therefore did as God commanded him: and they smote the host of the Philistines from Gibeon even to Gazer.

highlightedWords.meaning: God; mighty one
Philistines; inhabitants of Philistia

verses.text: And the fame of David went out into all lands; and the LORD brought the fear of him upon all nations.

highlightedWords.meaning: The covenant name of the God of Israel
Nations; peoples; Gentiles
